summary: Tested BREEAM Calculator with LEED comparison and PDF/Excel export functionality. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend BREEAM Calculator tab working with live score preview, Calculate Assessment button, results display, BREEAM vs LEED comparison, and Export dropdown with PDF/Excel options.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> in table - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in SustainabilityDashboard.jsx - table structure has <span> wrapping <tr> elements which is invalid HTML
context_for_next_testing_agent: BREEAM Calculator and export functionality fully tested. Backend APIs: POST /api/v1/sustainability/breeam/assess returns weighted_score, rating, value premiums. POST /api/v1/exports/sustainability/assessment supports format=pdf and format=excel with assessment_type=breeam or leed. Frontend: BREEAM tab visible in Sustainability module with calculator form, live score preview, BREEAM vs LEED comparison tab, and Export dropdown.
passed_tests: BREEAM tab visible in Sustainability module (data-testid: tab-breeam)
BREEAM Calculator form accepts input with Property Name, Sector, Scheme, Region, Floor Area, Property Value, Year Built fields
Category Scores sliders (0-100) for all 10 BREEAM categories (Management, Health & Wellbeing, Energy, Transport, Water, Materials, Waste, Land Use & Ecology, Pollution, Innovation)
Live Score Preview shows real-time calculation (55.0% Very Good)
BREEAM Rating Scale displayed (Pass 30%, Good 45%, Very Good 55%, Excellent 70%, Outstanding 85%)
Calculate BREEAM Assessment button works (data-testid: breeam-calculate-btn)
Assessment Result section appears after calculation with Weighted Score and Rating Level
Export as PDF option available in dropdown menu
Export as Excel option available in dropdown menu
BREEAM vs LEED comparison tab visible (data-testid: breeam-leed-comparison-tab)
Comparison tab shows BREEAM Categories (Score: 55.0%) and LEED Categories (Points: 53/110)
Side-by-Side Comparison section shows BREEAM (Very Good) vs LEED (Silver)
Rent Premium and Value Premium comparisons displayed for both certifications
Recommendation section shows 'BREEAM Recommended' for European markets with reasoning

breeam_calculator.returns: weighted_score (string like '55.0'), rating (pass/good/very_good/excellent/outstanding), estimated_rent_premium_percent, estimated_value_premium_percent, points_to_next_level, improvement_priorities

export_excel.returns: Valid XLSX file (starts with PK header - ZIP format)

breeam_weights.returns: weights object with all 10 categories and rating_thresholds
